message:
refactor(abi,membrane): replace ioctl-based interface enumeration with /sys/class/net and fix runtime math

Network interface ABI (inet_abi):
- Replace ioctl(SIOCGIFINDEX/SIOCGIFNAME) approach with direct /sys/class/net
  enumeration for if_nametoindex, if_indextoname, and if_nameindex
- Extract shared enumerate_interfaces() helper that reads interface names and
  indices from sysfs, eliminating socket creation and unsafe ioctl calls
- Remove IfreqCompat struct and libc::SYS_ioctl/SYS_socket syscall usage
- Add ifindex==0 guard to if_indextoname

dlfcn ABI:
- Simplify fetch_update closure in close_main_program_handle (cosmetic)

Membrane runtime math:
- EBR epoch advancement improvements
- Alpha investing calculation refinements
- SOS barrier invariant fix

Support matrix: update to reflect current coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

     {
       "symbol": "dlclose",
-      "status": "GlibcCallThrough",
+      "status": "Implemented",
       "module": "dlfcn_abi",
       "perf_class": "coldpath",
-      "strict_semantics": "dlfcn boundary policy: host glibc call-through for dlopen/dlsym/dlclose with thread-local dlerror contract",
-      "hardened_semantics": "dlfcn boundary policy: invalid dlopen flags heal to RTLD_NOW; null/denied loader inputs return deterministic dlerror",
+      "strict_semantics": "Native main-program handle close with deterministic refcounted invalid-handle rejection and thread-local dlerror contract",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Native main-program handle close with deterministic refcounted invalid-handle rejection and thread-local dlerror contract",
       "default_stub": false
     },

-      "hardened_semantics": "dlfcn boundary policy: invalid dlopen flags heal to RTLD_NOW; null/denied loader inputs return deterministic dlerror",
+      "strict_semantics": "Native phase-1 loader: NULL and recognized libc NOLOAD aliases return a local main-program handle; unsupported libraries return NULL with thread-local dlerror",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Native phase-1 loader: invalid flags heal to RTLD_NOW and NULL / recognized libc NOLOAD aliases return a local main-program handle; unsupported libraries return NULL with thread-local dlerror",
       "default_stub": false

-      "hardened_semantics": "dlfcn boundary policy: invalid dlopen flags heal to RTLD_NOW; null/denied loader inputs return deterministic dlerror",
+      "strict_semantics": "Native exported-symbol resolver for RTLD_DEFAULT, RTLD_NEXT, and the local main-program handle with thread-local dlerror on misses",
+      "hardened_semantics": "Native exported-symbol resolver for RTLD_DEFAULT, RTLD_NEXT, and the local main-program handle with deterministic invalid-handle / symbol-miss dlerror behavior",
